open_agent_prs.title: fix: disable LFS checkout in docs build and unbloat-docs AW
fix: correct assign-to-agent GraphQL mutations per official docs
fix: isolate copilot_sdk_driver test session state writes to prevent false-positive tool-denial issues
Extract hardcoded file paths to named constants
fix: increase sendAndWait timeout in sample SDK drivers from 60s to 10min
fix: preserve fenced code blocks during URL sanitization to prevent suggestion block corruption
fix: add_comment silently skips when integration token can't write to discussions
fix: prune orphaned entries from actions-lock.json on full compile
Impact Efficiency Report: progressive disclosure + fix artificial/missing data + recommendations
Harden workflow_call jobs against GHES output masking for artifact prefixes and target repo resolution

notes: 10 open copilot-swe-agent PRs, all branch-based (is_fork=false).
